_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in communicating with all levels of the organization, including senior/mid-level executives, and operational-level personnel (e.g., interpersonal skills, approachability, effective listening skills, appropriate use of style and language for the audience).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing data and AI training programs for diverse organizational audiences, from executives to operational staff, with role-appropriate content and delivery formats.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.536), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.526).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.558). Shared vocabulary: [appropriate, executives, operational, skill]. DCWF-only terms [approachability, audience, communicating, effective, interpersonal, language] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audiences, content, data, delivery, designing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.864, R=0.892). R exceeds P by 0.028 — the WIDAI KSA's 23 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 31 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in communicating with all levels of the organization, including senior/mid" and "Skill in designing data and AI training programs for diverse organizational audi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.559 ≈ STS 0.558 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [appropriate, executives, operational, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.8%. Shared tokens: [appropriate, executives, operational, skill]. DCWF-only: [approachability, audience, communicating, effective, interpersonal, language]. WIDAI-only: [ai, audiences, content, data, delivery, designing].
